mapper.delete:
delete from cm_getability where courseid=#{courseid} and id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
select k.name as keywordname, a.name as abilityname from cm_kwadict kwa inner join cm_keywords k on k.id = kwa.keywordid inner join cm_ability a on a.id = kwa.abilityid where kwa.courseid=#{obsId} and kwa.abilityid in
#{id}
